strategy: Ignore the Elephant at first. His -90% Tower Shield refreshes whenever he is hit and cannot be removed by damage while the other Guardians live.
Kill the Gorilla, Lion, and Zebra Guardians first. This is a kill-order fight.
When a wizard gets marked with 'Only charms can save you now!', cast any charm on that wizard within 2 rounds to cancel the punishment.
If you must hit the Elephant early, strip his Tower Shield with Pierce, Steal Ward, or Shatter first.
Once all three other Guardians are down, the Elephant strips his own shields. Pour blades and traps and hit him then.
After that he casts Ominous Scarecrow (Death AoE) every 3 rounds. Shield and finish the 7390 health fast.
cheatNotes: He wears a -90% Tower Shield he re-applies every time he is hit, and it will not come off through damage while the other Guardians live.
Pierce, Steal Ward, or Shatter safely remove that Tower Shield, though he re-shields when attacked again.
He marks a random wizard for 2 rounds. If no charm is placed on that wizard, the other Guardians blast them.
Once the punishment fires or a charm is cast, he strips the mark and all wards and traps off that wizard, so do not stack traps on a marked wizard.
Casting any charm on the marked wizard cancels the whole punishment. Keep a spare blade handy.
Pet spells do not count; a pet charm will not clear the mark, so cast it yourself.
His stun shields can be removed with Shatter.
When the other three Guardians are dead he strips all wards off himself, including his Tower Shield. That is your window to hit unshielded.
After the minions die he casts Ominous Scarecrow (Death) every third round. Shield for it and burst him down.
